productDisplayName: Lino Perros Women Blue Sling Bag
description: Deviating from the label's standard leatherette trend, Linos Perros comes up with this line of distressed retro chic denim pieces for the contemporary vintage vibe. Work the 70's aesthetic with this stylish piece and style it with a worn-out denim vest or pants! Comes with a detacahle handle and shoulder strap.Height: 14 cmWidth: 28 cmDenim upper with leatherette trims with a buttonable flapRivet and bead tassel details with a brand patch on the flapMagnetic button closure on the flapTwo zippered compartments with a zippered pocket in one and two pouches in the otherOne pocket inside and a zippered pocket at the backCareWipe with a clean, damp cloth to remove dust
